name: Magic, battle, era, kingdom, RPG, fun (NUMBER: 2)
description:
🌑 The Situation

King Magnus has mysteriously died. The throne is not empty - it is cold and still smells of blood. 🩸 You are an inexperienced young heir who has unexpectedly become a ruler. And the kingdom is on the verge of disintegration:

💰 Treasury: In a swamp of debts.

📦 Warehouses: Emptying.

⚔️ The tribes of Norgard: Approaching from the north with fire and sword.

🤫 The Palace: Silent conspiracies are brewing inside.

La-Sarenta is falling. The only question is: When and how?

👤 Your Shadow - Buros

Your chief advisor Buros is always by your side. He does not argue about good and evil. ⚖️

⚙️ He understands only efficiency.

💀 If cruelty saves the state - he recommends cruelty.

🤥 If a lie delays war, he chooses a lie.

Buros is not loyal to you. He is loyal only to the Throne. He may protect you... But if necessary, he will not hesitate to sacrifice you. ♟️

♟️ Political Chess

Each of your decisions will move the four pillars of the kingdom:

🪙 Treasury - Between gold and hunger.

🛡️ Army - On the border of loyalty and rebellion.

👥 People - Between patience and anger.

🎖️ Reputation - Between fear and respect.

You sacrifice one to save the other. And in the palace, "wolves" like Lord Valerius are waiting for you to make a single mistake. 🐺

🌍 The World

La-Sarenta is not an ordinary kingdom. It is a living system that breathes intrigue. 🕸️ Here:
creator: ArturGboel
